_metadata.description: UID index for EPPP-Domain-Design anchor points. Disambiguates duplicate anchor IDs within the same subdomain.
notes: 75 anchor ID groups are duplicated within the same subdomain (same sub_code + anchor_id, different content). Use uid to disambiguate.
4 entries have identical content under different anchor IDs — these are true source duplicates: D3-PPA-02-2, D4-CLI-183, D6-ORG-003, D8-PPA-18
